title: Wall Street bank updates S&P 500 target for 2026
description: Wall Street banking giant has raised its S&P 500 target 2026 on positive corporate earnings and artificial intelligence growth.
content:
Wall Street banking giant Citigroup has raised its S&P 500 2026 year-end target from 7,700 to 8,100, citing positive corporate earnings as well as growth in artificial intelligence (AI).

title: Apple Expected to Detail Its A.I. Plans at Conference
description: For the second time, the company is expected to explain its artificial intelligence plans. Unlike some rivals, it is not reorganizing around the technology.
